news.title: Chancellor Search and Screen Committee named
news.summary_en: Amy B. Bogost, President of the Universities of Wisconsin Board of Regents, and Chris Patton, Executive-in-Charge of the Universities of Wisconsin, have appointed a 23-member Search and Screen Committee to help identify the next UW–Madison chancellor.

news.title: 2026 Chancellor’s Undergraduate Awards Ceremony recognizes 179 outstanding students
news.summary_en: Provost John Zumbrunnen praised the winners for expanding what we know and understand about our world.

news.title: Scientists measure force of powerful jets streaming from a black hole in the Cygnus system
news.summary_en: The findings confirm a theory posed by UW–Madison researchers a decade ago.

news.title: School spirit and silliness ensue at the Varsity Band Concert
news.summary_en: The annual performance showcases student talent and celebrates the end of the UW Marching Band season.

news.title: UW–Madison’s reach throughout Wisconsin adds up to $38.9 billion a year
news.summary_en: The university supports more than 287,000 jobs and helps drive private-sector growth.
